item.dc:creator: albaboss

item.title: Chess Grandmaster Anna Muzychuk, on refusing to play in Saudi Arabia.
item.description: 'In a few days, I'll lose two world titles, one after another. Because I decided not to go to Saudi Arabia. I refuse to play by special rules, wear abaya, be accompanied by a man so I can get out of the hotel, so I don't feel like a second-class person. 'I will follow my principles and not compete in the fast chess and blitz world championship where in just 5 days I could have made more money than with dozens of other combined tournaments. This is all very unpleasant but the sad part is that no one seems to care. Bitter feelings, but I can't go back.' Anna Muzychuk (originally posted by @ltoka00 on 2021-04-06 23:08:15)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Freshly Stolen Memes- A Dump for Paul #14
item.description: Dog tax of Louie. Louie belonged to Paul (from the title!) who is dying of lung cancer. He has been given 6 months. He is in dire straits financially since he cannot work and only recently got approved for Medicade. (He is 36 and has 2 kids). He has sold his possessions of value and this fundraiser is a last resort option for him. He needs money for medical bills, rent, prescriptions, food, and eventually end of life expenses. If you are of a giving mind or have recently been possessed by a charitable ghost, he has recently set up a PayPal fundraiser here >> https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/8IwCPIC0xc (Previous fundraiser was here https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/8HFMSlCe6u) Thank you to everyone who has sent well wishes, donated, and followed us thus far, we are very grateful for every like, message, and dollar, they make a tremendous difference. Please get any weird/new lumps and bumps on yourself checked, get weird coughs checked, and get a yearly physical if you can, it might save your life. ****EDIT**** - Most viral, woo-hoo! Glad this dump is being enjoyed! Extra thanks to the 4 of you awesome folks that have donated tonight, you guys rock! $40 is roughly gas costs for the week getting to and from appointments, thank you!!❤️***Double edit - Holy crap, thank you guys! Seriously, thank you. . . Previous Dumps for Paul 1 - https://imgur.com/gallery/K0dLkFj 2- https://imgur.com/gallery/S2tHMzN 3- https://imgur.com/gallery/0vwotvp 4- https://imgur.com/gallery/63ld6W5 5 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KZM2YJk 6- https://imgur.com/gallery/pHlA2CO 7-https://imgur.com/gallery/dBm3gVd 8-https://imgur.com/gallery/43RiEnM 9-https://imgur.com/gallery/SOkxyfm 10- https://imgur.com/gallery/4IBWVn1 11-https://imgur.com/gallery/Q2WKIPi 12 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KkoK6mb 13- https://imgur.com/gallery/A3PI7ur

item.title: Just adopted my first kitty and he's such a sweet boi.
item.description:
Me and my mom picking him up from the local PetSmart. Adopted through Angel of Hope Rescue.
He was found in Texas and relocated to Minnesota. He's 2 years old, lazy, calm, and was totally at home immediately. Not declawed (Angel of Hope Rescue does not allow declawing) Edit: Dont worry folks I hate declawing as much as the rest of you :)
Not an hour home and already asserting his dominance as boss of the house.
He plays like a kitten, and LOVES belly rubs!
*wink*
item.dc:creator: BaronVonDickButt

item.title: Things seen this week during structural assessments!
item.description:
Who else is bummed they missed this party?
Tickle tickle.
During the renovation process of this home, it was revealed that it had a failing brick foundation. Not something you want to see in the middle of an upgrade.
It was common in the early 1900s to use brick to build foundation walls. If you have an older home, you may notice this is your foundation type. The problem is that over time, they can become weak. Mortar breaks down, and bricks start to fall out.
Homes with brick foundations are all over Los Angeles and surrounding cities like Pasadena and Long Beach. While the curb appeal of these homes is outstanding, there is a risk. Since brick foundations have no steel holding the brick together, there is no way to guarantee how they will perform in an earthquake. Because of this, it is not possible to seismically retrofit a brick foundation.
Gaps between your mudsill and foundation wall might not seem like a big deal, but it allows moisture to get trapped and could cause the foundation bolts to rust and degrade over time.
A good rule of thumb is that your hand should not fit.
Bouncy floors. CHECK.
"Welcome to the crawlspace" - Mummified crawlspace rat.
Deck or failed retaining wall?
Yup, definitely a failed retaining wall.
item.dc:creator: AlphaStructural

item.dc:creator: willCodeForUpvotes

item.title: A small offer of memes in trade to listen to my problems.
item.description:
Parents have separated, considering divorce.
I'm sitting in their backroom (I don't live here) waiting for their current conversation to end because my mom is having a really hard time and she needs someone to be here for her.
She's in the darkest mental place she's been since she had active suicidal thoughts in her 20s.
I make sure she talks with her therapist since I am not the right person to guide her mental health. But I do everything I can to be present and make sure she knows she's not alone.
I am physically here when not at work because I fear her being alone for too long. I'm spending nights in the backroom because I want to make sure she knows I'm always here for her.
I know she'll get through this dark period. She's always been the strongest person I know.
I never thought I'd be in this position. I wish I could control everything and I can't. I wish I could make people communicate with each other better, but I can't.
I miss my partner and my dog while I look after my mom. I feel selfish for thinking of myself. I hope my father doesn't feel like I'm playing favorites. I know he's heartbroken too.
I don't want them to divorce. I want them to be happy. I know divorce may be the best for them, but I wish they wouldn't give up. I'm numb and in shock and keep feeling so many things. Things that don't seem like it should be possible to feel at the same time.
My handsome Ram - always so photogenic. He loves to sit outside with a soft toy and judge the neighbors. Thanks for reading ❤ I'm on a waitlist to see a therapist and just needed to vent a little. Don't feel shame for needing help. Reach out to someone who makes you feel safe.
item.dc:creator: merlotglow

item.title: 41 Days
item.description: Pictures of President Zelensky on 22nd February 2022 (just prior to the invasion), and in Bucha 2 days ago. A hero with the weight of a nation on his young shoulders. Our thought, our song Will not die, will not perish… Oh there, people, is our glory, Glory of Ukraine! (Taras Shevchenko)
item.dc:creator: HilbertsHotel

item.title: Victory Brinker, 10 years old the world's youngest opera singer
item.description: According to the Guinness World Records, Victory can reach over three octaves and serenade her audience in seven different languages and she has shocked people all over the world with her incredible talent singing Der Holle Rache (Queen of the Night) from Mozart’s Magic Flute.
item.dc:creator: vidadobl6

item.dc:creator: CarpetheCarp

item.title: To Help You Smile, Because I like You
item.description:
You can sign it, act it out, or think it, if you're not in a position to verbalize. Verbal speech isn't the only way to communicate!
Thirty is young in tortoise years!
We say our pets are part of the family, but this is the first time I've seen a cat with its own living room. How kind, to give this kitty their own space.
Go, Katie, go!
Cleverness is its own reward, sometimes.
We learn through experiences, and we hold on to experiences with the people we loved even if that love is fleeting.
When I was in school and being bullied, I would always hide out in the library. In high school I was there so often that the librarian had them make it one of my class electives to hang out in there. Being autistic was hard for me as a teen, but the library always offered refuge. The library IS a safe place.
Your future is informed by your past, but there's no limit to where you can go if you forgive yourself for the times you didn't have a way to make things better. Having scars and shadows doesn't make you unworthy, nor does it mean the future can't be safe and bright. You're amazing, you have value, you are important to the world, and I like you as you are.
item.dc:creator: kittenkatt
